q: व्यक्तित्व विकास से क्या तात्पर्य है?
What does Personality Development refer to?
opts: Continuous growth and enhancement of individual traits

q: Which statement best describes the significance of Personality Development?
opts: It has no impact on personal professional life
It is only relevant in childhood
It plays a crucial role in shaping behaviour attitudes
Personality traits remain unchanged throughout life

q: What is a key aspect of Personality Development?
Why is self awareness important in Personality Development?
opts: It helps individuals understand their strengths and weaknesses

q: What is the foundation of character building?
Which of the following is not a component of character building?
Which trait is essential for building a strong character?
What is the significance of empathy in character development?
Which kosha encompasses the intellectual faculties of the individual?
The kosha that represents the sheath of bliss and joy is called:
Which kosha is considered the innermost layer of the human personality?
The kosha associated with the mind and emotions is called:
Panchkosha in personality development represents the integration of:
opts: Mental, physical and emotional well being

q: Which of the following is not a physical aspect of personality development?
Which of the following is not one of the eight limbs of Ashtanga yoga?
What is the primary focus of Ashtanga yoga?
What does the term 'Ashtanga' mean in Sanskrit?
Which Ashtanga yoga limb involves withdrawal of the senses:
What is the purpose of practicing yamas and Niyamas in Ashtanga yoga?
opts: To cultivate ethical and disciplined living

q: Which of the following is not a component of citizenship awareness?
opts: Understanding one's rights and responsibilities as a member of society
Participating actively in community events and initiatives
Ignoring the needs of others for personal gain
Respecting the laws and regulations of the country

Which behaviour fosters empathy and emotional intelligence?
